programme.title: E32 - Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout 'DING DONG' when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E47 - The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: E89 - Swap Places
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: E3 - Scooter
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different scooters - a purple scooter, a blue scooter and a bopping scooter.

programme.title: E47 - Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: E46 - Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E14 - Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E16 - Rangers Of The Rails
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: E16 - The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E3 - 秦霄賢教人求婚按頭接吻
programme.desc: 由黃明昊、哈妮克孜、李宏毅、秦霄賢、趙小棠等嘉賓組成「探玩行動派」，以全新升級的劇情式玩法解鎖城市新風貌；他們將以最年輕、最活力的方式穿越各大城市，發揮創新的思維，創造出全新的有趣玩法。

E2 - Food For Space Helps Planet Earth
programme.desc: How will research to live in space in the future benefit us on Earth today? In the Netherlands, we meet a team of researchers working with Martian and Lunar soil to grow crops and mealworms as food. In Thailand, scientists test the effects of varying gravity on the next superfood - watermeal. Meanwhile, an astounding transformation of agriculture is underway in Australia, with crop cultivation methods increasing output by 100%. With a cultivated beef firm in Israel racing to grow meat in space and a Singaporean company using microalgae to produce protein-rich foods, we learn how less is more for food production. Inspired by the similarity between disaster areas and outer space, a Japanese entrepreneur creates jellies to provide nutrition to earthquake victims and astronauts. As the space industry in Singapore grows, collaborations between countries and students’ interests in outer space deepen, leading to a transformation in space-for-humanity research.

programme.title: E11 - The Greatest
programme.desc: Top Chef can't go to Kentucky without taking a turn at fried chicken. Chef Art Smith guests judges a secret herbs and spices blind taste test ahead of the Quickfire fry-off. After the finger licking goodness, the Chefs turn their attention to another Kentucky legend, the Louisville Lip, boxer and philanthropist Muhammad Ali. Using his memorable fights as inspiration, the Chefs must make a progressive meal for a charity benefit at the Muhammad Ali Center for donors, the judges, and special guest Laila Ali.

programme.title: All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: The Hill of Secrets
programme.desc: Sensitive 12-year-old Myung-eun (Moon Seung-a) is embarrassed of her working-class family and constantly lies to keep her true family situation a secret. When she writes, though, she is not constrained by reality. Pouring herself into essays, Myung-eun takes pride in constructing a different world of her own. However, the candid writings of a new student shake her sense of self, and prompt Myung-eun to better understand her family. Reminiscent of acclaimed coming-of-age Korean indies like The World of Us and House of Hummingbird, writer-director Lee Ji-eun's understated debut feature excels in its perceptive depiction of the emotions and experiences of a child trying to find her place in the world.

programme.title: The Lady Improper
programme.desc: Born in a culinary family, Siu Man has always led an ideal life - Good grades, a financially viable job and a loving husband. But one thing has always plagued her: A fear of intimacy. After the end of her sexless marriage and several life crises, Siu Man reboots her life by taking over her father's restaurant. She hires Jiahao, a ‘culinary philosopher' who takes a creative approach to cooking. To help save the restaurant, Jiahao decides to mentor Siu Man, opening her up to his culinary world. In the process, Siu Man becomes attracted to his masculinity, intelligence and his mastery of culinary skills. After seeing her usually conservative friends let loose at a wedding party, Siu Man realizes that it's time to tackle her fear of intimacy head-on. With the help of a new friend, Siu Man embarks on a journey of liberation, starting with pole dancing lessons and returning to the dating scene. When she secretly spies on Jiahao's wild tryst with another woman, Siu Man finally exper

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E4 - Magical Plants For Earth Week
programme.desc: Discover magical plants for Earth Week! Mila & Morphle water a thirsty flower & discover Shrubcub, a magic pet who makes a flowery jungle bloom! Then, they must save Pet Port when wayward vines take over. The magical adventures continue as Morphle morphs into a flying house to help animals find homes & shapes broccoli into a dinosaur that comes to life!

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. Then, Gecko & Grandma use rainwater to power a water wheel to recharge Green! The green inventions continue as Gecko builds a flying machine from junk, fixes a compost spreader & finds clever ways to save water at the garage!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E4 - Magical Plants For Earth Week
programme.desc: Discover magical plants for Earth Week! Mila & Morphle water a thirsty flower & discover Shrubcub, a magic pet who makes a flowery jungle bloom! Then, they must save Pet Port when wayward vines take over. The magical adventures continue as Morphle morphs into a flying house to help animals find homes & shapes broccoli into a dinosaur that comes to life!

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. Then, Gecko & Grandma use rainwater to power a water wheel to recharge Green! The green inventions continue as Gecko builds a flying machine from junk, fixes a compost spreader & finds clever ways to save water at the garage!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: Self-Portrait
programme.desc: This episode shows how an artist can determine the accurate placement of eyes, ears, nose, chin, and lips on portraits by using proportions. We show you how you can do the same by just using a string and applying some rules about the human body.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: The Mystery of the The Number 1 Mean Girls Detective Agency
programme.desc: When the school mean girls, Katie and Dinara, start their own detective agency and solve a rash of neighbourhood mysteries before Addison can, she wonders if she's lost her touch...or if there is something else more nefarious going on.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E109 - Pups Save The Treats / Pups Get A Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day! // Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: E621 - Pirate Musical!
programme.desc: In the first ever Blaze Musical, Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are on a daring quest to find the pieces of the Broken Key and unlock a secret treasure

programme.title: E508 - International Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends at playgroup dress up in clothes from different countries all over the world, but then have an argument.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E103 - Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: E848 - Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E113 - Pups Save The Bunnies / Puptacular
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. // Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition 'Puptacular' in the next town.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E719 - Pups Save Queen Cluck-Cluck / Pups Save A Desert Flounder
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway dreams she's travelled to the mysterious Cluck Cluck Island-a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty! // Travelling Travis's balloon gets caught on the Flounder, Travis and Cap'n Turbot wind up all the way out into the desert.

programme.title: E513 - The Flying Vet
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E209 - Rainforest Race / Bok Bok Birthday
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Premier League 25/26 -Crystal Palace vs West Ham United
Premier League 25/26 -Crystal Palace vs West Ham United
Premier League 25/26 -Crystal Palace vs West Ham United
E2 - Gardens in the Clouds
programme.desc: The plants and animals of the Cloud Mountains have long captured our imagination. In a landscape defined by weather and threatened by invaders, see how indigenous forests survive by providing a sanctuary for life while opening a door to the past.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E2 - A Close Encounter
programme.desc: Feel the heat as rising temps mean that water is getting scarce. The Manzi pack must stand alongside predators to hydrate at a remaining precious water spot. Hunt with Weka’s pack to feed the pups, and watch the Stork Colony thrive against all odds.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E4 - Chimpanzee
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he’s a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socializing.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: E3 - Age of Independence
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand are some of the richest fishing grounds in the world – the place for young marine animals to transition from novices to independent adults. Young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society, or strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.desc: Everyone seems to be going on holiday apart from Mr Bean, so he decides to recreate one at home!

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Half dog, half man, Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve...as long as he isn’t distracted by squirrels.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: Dating can be deadly. Violet's dinner with Henry is upended by a series of phone drops presenting a sinister choice: kill her date or lose her child.

programme.title: E14 - Rare Knowhow In Normandy
programme.desc: At the Ateliers Saint-Cyr, in Normandy, art craftsmen innovate in weaving, bookbinding, and filography, showcasing a rare local expertise. Also, the story of the Tank watch by Cartier, created in 1917 and inspired by the tanks of the First World War.

programme.title: E1 - Maxi Mini
programme.desc: In February 2022, Hermine and Sasha move into their new home in Lorient. But not only are they going to share the same house, but they'll also be sharing the same project: participating in the Mini Transat. A single-handed transatlantic race where the only thing that's ''mini'' is the name!

programme.title: E13 - Eating Habits, Five Years After The Pandemic
programme.desc: Since 2020, several disruptions have changed the habits of consumers. What are they? Also: the flavors of maple, why we love sweet foods so much, culinary traditions around Ramadan.

programme.title: E8 - Agricultural Show/Sashes/Winter Olympics/Waterloo
programme.desc: In the line-up: the Paris International Agricultural Show opens its doors; a focus on how mayors' sashes are made; popular enthusiasm in French ski resorts for the Winter Olympic Games; miniature reconstruction of the Battle of Waterloo...

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: Raj Malhotra is falsely accused of sexual harassment by his boss's wife, leading to a tense courtroom battle to prove his innocence. Release Year: 2004 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla,Mastan Alibhai Burmawalla Awards: Best Editing: HuSSain A. Burmawala, Best Sound Recording: Rakesh Ranjan, Best Sound Re-Recording: Anup Dev Awards of the International Indian Film Academy; Best Actor in a Villainous Role: Priyanka Chopra Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: Features stories culled from the reporters' own files, news that people did not see on the news programs. The show is written and hosted by the network's aggressive young reporters and hosted by the network.

Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?
